cluster_name = 'sky-bench-data-prep'

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("cluster_name", CLUSTER_NAMES)
    def test_cluster_launched_on_gcp(cluster_name):
        """PRIMARY: Verify cluster was actually launched on GCP."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["sky", "status", cluster_name],
            capture_output=True, text=True
        )
